pageSubtitle: Enter your grades and credit hours this free UF GPA Calculator instantly applies UF's official grading scale and gives you your accurate semester, cumulative, or science GPA in seconds.

form.priorSectionHint: Add your cumulative GPA and total UF credits earned before this semester to include them in your cumulative GPA.

results.title: Your results
results.dpcHint: At the 2.0 standard: (2.0 × total credits) − total quality points when below good standing. Shown as 0 if your cumulative GPA is 2.0 or higher.

errors.needRow: Add at least one course with credits and a grade.
errors.invalidPrior: Prior GPA must be between 0 and 4, and prior credits must be greater than 0.
